Name: MenuFilter
Description: Determines the configuration of screen effect filters.

Fields.Name: Chromatic Aberration Deviation: 0
Fields.Description: The chormatic aberration deviation to use for this filter.

Fields.Name: Chromatic Aberration Deviation: 1
Fields.Description: The chormatic aberration deviation to use for this filter.

Fields.Name: Noise Texture: Index
Fields.Description: The index of the noise texture to use.

Fields.Name: Noise Texture: Mask Index
Fields.Description: The index of the noise texture mask to use.

Fields.Name: Noise Texture: Horizontal Scale
Fields.Description: The horizontal scaling for the noise texture.

Fields.Name: Noise Texture: Vertical Scale
Fields.Description: The vertical scaling for the noise texture.

Fields.Name: Noise Texture: Blend Rate
Fields.Description: The blending rate for the noise texture.

Fields.Name: Noise Texture: External Blend Rate
Fields.Description: The blend rate for the noise texture for areas outside of the menu. 0 only applies to the menu drawing area, 1 to the entire screen.

Fields.Name: Noise Texture: Update Interval
Fields.Description: The random update interval for the noise texture.

Fields.Name: Contrast
Fields.Description: The contrast value for this filter.

Fields.Name: Noise Centre Dilution
Fields.Description: The amount of noise dilution to apply to the centre of the screen. -1 means no noise near centre, 1 means full noise near centre.
